sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rounding (value NUMERIC, decimal_places INTEGER);
SELECT value, decimal_places, round_even(value, decimal_places) AS rounded_value FROM test_rounding;
UPDATE test_rounding SET value = round_even(value, decimal_places) WHERE decimal_places < 2;
SELECT DISTINCT round_even(value + 0.1, 1) AS adjusted_rounded_value FROM test_rounding;
